title: Distribution and Marketing Support, AM
description:
Job Responsibilities 

Distribution Support

  • Provide end-to-end sales and case management support for advisers, brokers, and bank partners, ensuring accurate submissions, proactive follow-ups, and reduced turnaround times.
  • Deliver responsive, solution-oriented support to distribution partners, addressing enquiries and guiding partners to improve case quality and overall experience.
  • Maintain accurate tracking of sales pipelines and case progress, identify issues for resolution, and prepare regular and ad-hoc management reports with a focus on efficiency and automation.
  • Conduct training for distribution partners on business processes, systems, and tools; coordinate onboarding and due diligence for new partners; and support ongoing partner reviews.
  • Support system testing (UAT), new product or system implementations, and cross-functional or regional projects, contributing to continuous process improvement.
  • Conduct training for distribution partners on processes, systems, and tools; coordinate onboarding and due diligence reviews for new partners; and support ongoing service level reviews.

Marketing & Communications Support

  • Act as a key point of contact for marketing initiatives, supporting the planning, execution, and review of campaigns, partner communications, and engagement activities.
  • Coordinate and support engagement events and activities for business partners, ensuring smooth execution and a positive end-to-end experience.
  • Manage marketing collateral and merchandising materials, ensuring content is current, stock levels are maintained, and materials are distributed according to partner needs.
  • Gather market and competitor insights, provide updates to internal stakeholders, and collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to support aligned communication and distribution strategies.

Requirements

  • Minimum 3 years’ experience in sales support, case management and distribution within financial services or insurance.
  • Recognized tertiary qualification; relevant financial services or insurance certifications are an advantage.
  • Working knowledge of life insurance products and basic insurance operations
  • Possess Life Insurance Product knowledge ideally within HNW market

postedCompany.description:
We’re LMA, a professional recruitment agency that’s powered by curiosity. We’re here to create better outcomes for clients and jobseekers all around the world, by asking better, more meaningful questions that lead to positive change, for their companies, and their careers.

For our clients it gives us the ability to know your company better. To understand what ‘cultural fit’ really means. To find the candidate that’s ready for next, as well as right now.

For the candidates we serve, our curiosity drives deeper relationships, getting to know the real you, and not the you that only exists on paper. We operate within the finance, banking & financial services, human resources, operations, business support sectors across the UK, Asia and the US.
postedCompany.name: LMA RECRUITMENT SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
